Thanks for taking the time to report a bug. The more detail you give, the faster it can be fixed.

**Before submitting:** please search existing issues to avoid duplicates.

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

<!-- What you expected to happen instead. -->
